title: Variant annotation (Ensembl VEP REST, batch)
description: Same SHAPE as ClawBio's 'Variant Annotation' skill (Annotate VCF variants with Ensembl VEP REST, ClinVar significance, gnomAD frequencies — https://github.com/ClawBio/ClawBio), as DATA. It annotates a BATCH of variants via VEP's real multi-variant endpoint (POST /vep/human/id with an `ids` body) — the same call shape a whole VCF uses (chunk the VCF into id/region batches). VEP's nested transcript_consequences carry impact and colocated_variants carry gnomAD allele frequency + ClinVar clin_sig, so the agent unnests the envelope in SQL and filters 'rare, high-impact, pathogenic' across the batch. There is NO VEP/ClinVar/gnomAD-specific TypeScript — the URL, method, body, and response shape live in the manifest; the same generic http.get resolver serves any JSON/CSV endpoint (GET or read-only POST query). Network is the host's opt-in by composition: this manifest fails closed until a host injects a fetch (load the explicit index-networked.ts entrypoint).

resolvers.title: HTTP fetch
resolvers.description: GET a URL, or POST a read-only query body, and materialize the JSON/CSV response into a table.
